messages.message: A `require()` style import is forbidden.
Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

messages.message: 'healthDetails' is never reassigned. Use 'const' instead.

fix.text: const healthDetails = await fetch(`${API_URL}/health`).then(r => r.json()).catch(e => null);

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'fetchUnreadCount'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [fetchUnreadCount, isAuthenticated, token]

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'fetchNotifications'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [fetchNotifications, isOpen, token]

suggestions.desc: Replace empty interface with a type alias.
